svg.text: Figure 3 candidate | Boundary-cost design law for measurement-induced activation
Coherent-boundary discrimination benchmark with the proved lower bound and two concrete measurement routes
Solid blue: homodyne-conditioned route. Dashed red: displaced on-off route. Color intensity denotes detector efficiency.
Photon cost versus target boundary error
Constant-factor overhead above the lower bound
Detector efficiency sets the shared 1/η penalty.
Measurement choice sets the remaining prefactor.
Neither route is claimed to be globally optimal.
Curves computed from the saved analytical models in same_axis_metrics.py; lower panel bands mark near-frontier, moderate-overhead and detector-limited regimes within this benchmark.
